Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents;
Off Calendar Aug-17-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED.

PLAINTIFF BERTL, INC.'s Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents is denied as to Nos. 2, 3, 6, 7, 9, and 11 as they are overly broad. The motion is granted as to No. 10, limited to documents exchanged by the entities relating to their relationship and services rendered by each. The motion is denied as to No. 14 as the response is adequate. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. Prevailing party to submit a form of order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
